Class IncomeTracker

java.lang.Object
model.IncomeTracker
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tracker<Income>
public class IncomeTracker extends Object implements Tracker<Income>
Implementation of the Tracker interface for managing income entries. This class follows the Singleton pattern to ensure only one instance exists. Provides functionality to add, edit, delete, validate, and calculate income entries, as well as persistence capabilities to save and load income data from files.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Your Name
See Also:

  • Income

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static IncomeTracker getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of IncomeTracker. Creates a new instance if one doesn't exist yet.
      Returns:
      The singleton instance of IncomeTracker

    • getAllIncome

      public List<Income> getAllIncome()
      Retrieves all income entries stored in the tracker. Returns a defensive copy of the internal list to prevent modification.
      Returns:
      A new ArrayList containing all income entries

    • getUserIncome

      public List<Income> getUserIncome(int userId)
      Retrieves income entries for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose income entries are to be retrieved
      Returns:
      A list of income entries belonging to the specified user

    • add

      public void add(Income income)
      Adds a new income entry to the tracker. Validates the income entry before adding it.
      Specified by:
      add in interface Tracker<Income>
      Parameters:
      income - The income entry to add
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the income entry is invalid

    • edit

      public void edit(Income updatedIncome)
      Updates an existing income entry in the tracker. Validates the updated income entry before editing.
      Specified by:
      edit in interface Tracker<Income>
      Parameters:
      updatedIncome - The updated income entry
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the income entry is invalid or not found

    • delete

      public void delete(String id)
      Deletes an income entry from the tracker by its ID.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface Tracker<Income>
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the income entry to delete

    • validate

      public boolean validate(Income income)
      Validates an income entry by checking that required fields are present and valid. An income entry is valid if: - It is not null - Its source is not null or empty - Its amount is not null and greater than zero - Its date is not null
      Specified by:
      validate in interface Tracker<Income>
      Parameters:
      income - The income entry to validate
      Returns:
      true if the income entry is valid, false otherwise

    • calculateAmount

      public BigDecimal calculateAmount()
      Calculates the total amount of all income entries.
      Specified by:
      calculateAmount in interface Tracker<Income>
      Returns:
      The total amount as a BigDecimal

    • calculateUserTotalIncome

      public BigDecimal calculateUserTotalIncome(int userId)
      Calculates the total amount of income for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose total income is to be calculated
      Returns:
      The total income amount for the specified user as a BigDecimal

    • saveData

      public void saveData(int userId)
      Saves income data for a specific user to a file. The file is stored in the 'data' directory with the name '{userId}_income.dat'.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose income data is to be saved

    • loadData

      public void loadData(int userId)
      Loads income data for a specific user from a file. If the file doesn't exist, no action is taken. The method removes any existing income entries for the user and replaces them with the loaded ones.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose income data is to be loaded

    • clearData

      public void clearData()
      Clears all income data from the tracker.
